articles.title: Save almost $200 on a flagship AMD 9850X3D CPU and 9070 XT GPU with this Newegg combo bundle — AMD's Ryzen 9 9850X3D and Radeon RX 9070 XT can be yours at a great price
articles.summary: If you've been looking to build a 4K-ready but the prices during the AI boom has scared you off, we've got just the deal to start you off. You can grab AMD's top-tier Ryzen 9 9850X3D CPU and RX 9070 XT GPU for less than $1,000 right now on Newegg. You're getting a combined savings of almost $200 across both items.
articles.title_zh: 在 Newegg 組合套餐中節省近 $200 購買旗艦 AMD 9850X3D CPU 和 9070 XT GPU — AMD 的 Ryzen 9 9850X3D 和 Radeon RX 9070 XT 現在價格優惠
articles.summary_zh: 如果你一直想組建 4K 準備電腦但被 AI 熱潮的價格嚇退，現在有個絕佳的交易。你可以在 Newegg 上以不到 $1,000 的價格購買 AMD 頂級 Ryzen 9 9850X3D CPU 和 RX 9070 XT GPU，組合節省近 $200。

articles.title: 007: First Light drops last-minute Denuvo DRM bombshell, leaving pre-order customers and fans furious — Bond title risks FPS drops and strict online check-ins, Pirates eagerly await repack as day-one cracks become the norm
articles.summary: IO Interative's latest James Bond adventure has been hit with the curse of Denuvo DRM, leaving many paying customers frustrated over a deliberate roadblock. With all versions of Denuvo now cracked anyways, there's a high chance 007: First Light will be cracked within a few days of its launch anyways.
articles.title_zh: 007: First Light 在最後一刻投下 Denuvo DRM 炸彈，預購客戶和粉絲憤怒 — 這部 Bond 大片面臨 FPS 下降和嚴格線上驗證的風險，盜版者已準備就緒
articles.summary_zh: IO Interactive 最新的詹姆斯龐德冒險遭到 Denuvo DRM 的困擾，許多付費客戶對這個刻意設置的障礙感到沮喪。由於所有版本的 Denuvo 都已被破解，007: First Light 在推出後幾天內極有可能被破解。

articles.title: iOS 27 to feature upgraded Camera interface and Photos app: Here’s what’s rumored
articles.summary: While many of the iOS 27 rumors have focused on Apple Intelligence, Siri, and performance – there’s a plethora of upgrades reportedly coming to the Camera app, building on top of the redesign that we saw last year with iOS 26. There’ll also be a number of new AI-enhanced editing tools coming to the Photos app. more…
articles.title_zh: iOS 27 將採用升級的 Camera 介面和 Photos 應用程式：以下是傳言的功能
articles.summary_zh: 除了 Apple Intelligence、Siri 和效能改進外，iOS 27 還傳聞將在 Camera 應用程式中帶來大量升級，並新增多項 AI 增強編輯工具。

articles.title: Apple registers new ‘gen AI’ subdomain ahead of next month’s WWDC keynote
articles.summary: Apple has just registered a new subdomain record ahead of WWDC: genai.apple.com. All signs point to WWDC 2026 being Apple’s major AI renaissance, where the company will live up to the promises it made back at WWDC 2024, as well as a few additional new announcements. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple 在下月 WWDC 主題演講前註冊新的 'gen AI' 子網域
articles.summary_zh: Apple 註冊了 genai.apple.com 新子網域，WWDC 2026 有望成為 Apple 的重大 AI 復興時刻，實現其在 WWDC 2024 的承諾並推出新功能。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Poppy’ is a proactive AI assistant that handles what Siri still can’t
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . In a world full of AI assistants and tools that try to make your life easier, Poppy takes a different approach. Rather than requiring your effort up front, Poppy does its best to be proactive – and give you helpful context before you even know you need it. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用程式亮點：'Poppy' 是一個主動式 AI 助手，可處理 Siri 仍無法完成的任務
articles.summary_zh: Poppy 是一款獨立開發的 AI 助手應用程式，採用與眾不同的方式來簡化您的生活。

articles.title: Apple’s Focus filters are a great feature, but they have a glaring blind spot: group chats
articles.summary: Introduced in iOS 16, Focus Filters are excellent in premise. If you’re in say, a Work focus, you can block out distracting apps, websites, and notifications. It even works in Messages, where you’ll only see texts from people in your Work focus. There’s one caveat with its implementation in Messages though, and it makes it much less useful for me than it could be. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple 的焦點篩選是絕佳功能，但在群組聊天中存在明顯漏洞
articles.summary_zh: iOS 16 引入的焦點篩選概念優秀，但在 Messages 應用程式中的實作存在限制，特別是在群組聊天方面。

articles.title: These premium desk accessories completely upgraded my setup [Video]
articles.summary: Desk setups are ever evolving. Because so much of our workflow and desk revolves around tech, which changes constantly, the products we use every day naturally change alongside it. But one thing I’ve noticed over the years is that when I invest a little more in premium accessories, they tend to last much longer. There will always be a place for budget-conscious products, but the accessories I keep coming back to are usually well-built, thoughtfully designed, and that improve my overall workflow. I wanted to share some of my favorite premium desk accessories that would benefit anyone’s setup, whether for gaming, work, or leisure. more…
articles.title_zh: 這些高級辦公桌配件完全升級了我的設置 [視頻]
articles.summary_zh: 投資高級配件往往能提供更長的使用壽命，隨著工作流程和技術的不斷演變，辦公桌設置也需要相應更新。

articles.title: Gemini Live redesign now works with more ‘Connected Apps’ on Android
articles.summary: As part of the Neural Expressive redesign , Gemini Live on Android can now access more first- and third-party “Connected Apps.” more…
articles.title_zh: Gemini Live 重新設計現在在 Android 上支援更多「連接應用程式」
articles.summary_zh: 作為 Neural Expressive 重新設計的一部分，Android 上的 Gemini Live 現在可以存取更多第一方和第三方「連接應用程式」。

articles.title: You can turn off AI in Google Search results with this easy modifier
articles.summary: AI in Google Search can be useful, but it’s also one of those “love it or hate it” tools. If you’ve been wanting to turn AI Overviews in Google Search off, though, there’s a pretty easy way to do that. more…
articles.title_zh: 您可以使用此簡單修飾符在 Google Search 結果中關閉 AI
articles.summary_zh: Google Search 中的 AI Overviews 很有用但有褒貶不一的評價，現在有簡單方式可以關閉此功能。

articles.title: Weekly poll: which Android 17 features are you excited about?
articles.summary: Android 17 has been in beta for a while now, but Google keeps adding new features. If you haven’t been following along with all the announcements, you can watch the 90-second recap video below to get the highlights. There are longer videos with details on the core Android experience, Gemini Intelligence, Android Auto and, of course, the Googlebook. That’s a lot to take in – there are so many new features and new products! But did any of them get you excited – which ones? That’s what we want to find out this week. Some of these are overdue – Google touts that Instagram videos taken...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：您對 Android 17 的哪些功能感到興奮？
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 已進行測試一段時間，Google 持續新增功能，您可以觀看 90 秒概要影片了解重點。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: Sony Xperia 1 VIII might be a hit, despite its high price
articles.summary: The results from last week’s poll have us wondering – do people really love the Sony Xperia 1 VIII so much or do they love phones with 3.5mm headphone jacks and microSD slots and the Xperia happens to be the only flagship to have those features? Because the results are quite positive – nearly a quarter of voters are willing to spend €1,500/£1,400 to get the Mark 8 and that is if they pick up the base 12/256GB unit. The 512GB and 1TB models cost more (€2,000/£1,850 in the case of the 1TB version). Interestingly, the positive vote could have gone higher, but Sony didn’t even launch the...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：Sony Xperia 1 VIII 儘管價格高昂但可能會大受歡迎
articles.summary_zh: 上週投票結果顯示極為正面，用戶可能對 Sony Xperia 1 VIII 擁有 3.5mm 耳機孔和 microSD 卡插槽感到滿意。

articles.title: Deals: OnePlus 15R paired with a free watch, Motorola Razr Fold and Razr 70 phones launch
articles.summary: This week the theme is “freebies” as several manufacturers pair phones with additional gadgets to try and draw in a crowd. We start with the OnePlus 15R, which comes with a free OnePlus Watch 3 43mm. And this is in addition to a €150 discount from its launch price. OnePlus 15R €150 offfree OnePlus Watch 3 43mm Read our review 12/256GB - €550 at Amazon DE 12/512GB - €650 at Amazon DE Next up, the Sony Xperia 1 VIII is on pre-order until June 19 –...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：OnePlus 15R 搭配免費手錶、Motorola Razr Fold 和 Razr 70 手機上市
articles.summary_zh: 本週多家製造商推出搭售優惠，OnePlus 15R 贈送免費 OnePlus Watch 3 43mm 並享有 €150 折扣。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs. Galaxy A56
articles.summary: If you are in the market for a mid-range smartphone, it's almost impossible not to stumble upon Samsung's Galaxy A lineup. But with the recent Samsung Galaxy A57 release, one would wonder whether the Samsung Galaxy A56 isn't actually a more sensible solution, seeing the somewhat modest hardware upgrade. After all, last year's Galaxy A56 is still relevant and sells at a lower price. Since the more recent Galaxy offers only minor design changes and a newer chipset, it's probably safe to assume that the Galaxy A56 will get you a lot of the way while saving you a few bucks. But even trivial...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy A57 對比 Galaxy A56
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 Samsung Galaxy A57 發布，消費者可能會質疑 Galaxy A56 是否仍是更明智的選擇，考慮到其硬體升級相對溫和。

articles.title: Apple's sleep apnea notifications and hearing test features are now available in India
articles.summary: Apple has announced the expansion of sleep apnea notifications and hearing test features to India. Sleep apnea is a condition in which a person's breathing momentarily stops during sleep, preventing the body from getting enough oxygen. If left untreated, it can lead to health consequences over time, including increased risk of hypertension, type 2 diabetes, and cardiac issues. Apple Watch helps its users detect signs of sleep apnea. It's done with the help of an Apple Watch metric called Breathing Disturbances, which uses the smartwatch's accelerometer to detect small movements at the...
articles.title_zh: Apple 的睡眠呼吸暫停通知和聽力測試功能現已在印度上市
articles.summary_zh: Apple 宣布將睡眠呼吸暫停通知和聽力測試功能擴展至印度，睡眠呼吸暫停症是一種在睡眠期間呼吸暫時停止的疾病。

articles.title: Xiaomi gives us our best official look yet at the 17T, reveals magnification of 17T series' telephoto cameras
articles.summary: The Xiaomi 17T and Xiaomi 17T Pro will be unveiled on May 28, followed by the 17T's launch in India on June 4. Xiaomi already revealed the rear designs of the 17T and 17T Pro, and now its Indian branch has given us our best official look yet at the non-Pro model through a video clip on X. The video, included in the X post embedded below, shows the 17T in the same color as before but reveals that the smartphone will pack a display with a centered punch hole for the selfie camera, corroborating previous design leaks. Turn heads with every shot.The all-new #Xiaomi17T is co-engineered with...
articles.title_zh: Xiaomi 為我們提供迄今最佳的 17T 官方展示，揭示 17T 系列長焦相機的放大倍率
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi 17T 和 17T Pro 將於 5 月 28 日發布，17T 將於 6 月 4 日在印度上市，Xiaomi 印度分公司已透過 X 影片展示非 Pro 版本的設計。

articles.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
articles.summary: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.
articles.title_zh: Ferrari 使用 IBM 的 AI 技術打造 F1 超級粉絲
articles.summary_zh: IBM 和 Scuderia Ferrari HP 向 TechCrunch 展示他們如何重新定義車迷體驗。

articles.title: OpenClaw passed 300,000 GitHub stars. Then Google launched Spark.
articles.summary: OpenClaw made the always-on agent feel personal by making it live somewhere you could point at — a Mac mini on a shelf, drawing seven watts, running while you sleep. Peter Steinberger’s open-source project surpassed 300,000 GitHub stars by April and became one of the fastest-growing repositories on GitHub. The whole appeal was ownership: your hardware, your credentials, your lobster. On Tuesday at I/O, Google launched Gemini Spark , and it makes the opposite bet. Spark is a 24/7 personal agent built on Gemini 3.5 Flash and connected to Google’s Antigravity agent stack. It runs in the background on virtual machines on Google Cloud. You never see the machine. Google plans to let you text and email the agent directly, so it works while your laptop is shut. The split is about
articles.title_zh: OpenClaw 突破 300,000 GitHub 星標，隨後 Google 推出 Spark
articles.summary_zh: OpenClaw 透過在 Mac mini 上運行（功耗僅七瓦，可持續全天運行）使 always-on agent 更具個人化，Peter Steinberger 的開源項目在 4 月份超過 300,000 個 GitHub 星標，成為增長最快的儲存庫之一。

articles.title: Best Power Banks (2026): My Picks After Testing Over 100
articles.summary: Keep your phone, laptop, handheld gaming console, and other electronics running with these travel-friendly power banks.
articles.title_zh: 最佳行動電源(2026)：我測試超過100款後的精選推薦
articles.summary_zh: 這些便攜式行動電源可讓你的手機、筆記型電腦、掌上型遊戲機和其他電子設備在旅途中持續運行。

articles.title: Hyperscaler Debt Flood Brings Derivatives Bonanza
articles.summary: As big tech companies raise hundreds of billions of dollars to fund artificial intelligence investments, Wall Street banks are increasingly finding they have to trade more credit derivatives to keep doing business with the hyperscalers.
articles.title_zh: 超大規模數據中心債務激增帶來衍生品繁榮
articles.summary_zh: 隨著大型科技公司籌集數千億美元資金用於人工智能投資，華爾街銀行發現需要交易更多信用衍生品才能繼續與超大規模數據中心廠商開展業務。

articles.title: SpaceX's Starship V3—still a work in progress—mostly successful on first flight
articles.summary: SpaceX launched the first test flight of its upgraded Starship rocket and Super Heavy booster Friday, with mostly positive results. The powerful rocket, propelled by 33 methane-fueled main engines, climbed away from SpaceX's Starbase launch facility in South Texas at 5:30 pm CDT (6:30 pm EDT; 22:30 UTC) Friday. Within a few seconds, the 408-foot-tall (124-meter) rocket, the largest ever built, cleared the launch tower and turned onto an eastward heading over the Gulf of Mexico. Starship splashed down on target in the Indian Ocean a little more than an hour later to conclude the first flight of the latest version of SpaceX's stainless steel mega-rocket. Starship V3 fared better on its debut than the first flights of Starship V1 and V2 in 2023 and 2025 . Both past versions of Starship broke
articles.title_zh: SpaceX Starship V3—仍在開發中—首次飛行基本成功
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 上週五成功進行了升級版 Starship 火箭和 Super Heavy 推進器的首次測試飛行，整體結果積極向好。這枚由33台甲烷燃料主引擎推動的強大火箭從德州南部的 SpaceX Starbase 發射設施於美國中部時間下午5:30升空。

articles.summary: 美國 NASA「費米伽瑪射線太空望遠鏡」（Fermi Gamma-ray Space Telescope）近期 […]
articles.title_zh: NASA 費米伽瑪射線太空望遠鏡首度偵測高能伽瑪射線，揭開「超亮超新星」能量之謎
articles.summary_zh: 美國 NASA「費米伽瑪射線太空望遠鏡」（Fermi Gamma-ray Space Telescope）近期 […]

articles.title: 人型機器人搭機引爭議，西南航空隨即封殺同類登機
articles.summary: 美國西南航空公司（Southwest Airlines）最近更新政策，禁止人型或動物外型機器人進入客艙，也不准 […]
articles.title_zh: 人型機器人搭機引爭議，西南航空隨即封殺同類登機
articles.summary_zh: 美國西南航空公司（Southwest Airlines）最近更新政策，禁止人型或動物外型機器人進入客艙，也不准 […]

articles.title: After $2.5 billion Supermicro smuggling bust, Nvidia CEO urges company to fix export control compliance — Taiwan also begins to crack down on AI GPU chip smuggling to China
articles.summary: Huang told reporters at Songshan Airport that Nvidia insists its partners follow U.S. trade rules.
articles.title_zh: Supermicro 25億美元走私案後，Nvidia CEO敦促公司修復出口管制合規問題——台灣也開始打擊AI GPU芯片走私至中國
articles.summary_zh: Huang在松山機場告訴記者，Nvidia堅持其合作夥伴遵守美國貿易規則。

articles.title: First ever Cray T3D Supercomputer goes up for auction with $81,000 reserve — Europe’s fastest supercomputer in June 1996 goes on the block
articles.summary: The first Cray T3D supercomputer ever produced, serial number 6001, was recently put up for auction, with opening bids from £60,000 (~$81,000) invited.
articles.title_zh: 首台Cray T3D超級計算機拍賣會開槌，保留價81,000美元——1996年6月歐洲最快超級計算機即將拍賣
articles.summary_zh: 首台生產的Cray T3D超級計算機（序列號6001）近日被拿出拍賣，起拍價為£60,000（約$81,000）。

articles.title: Steam Machine appears in Vulkan’s conformant product database — upcoming Valve console is certified compliant with the graphics API
articles.summary: The Khronos Group, which created the Vulkan API standard and continues to develop and maintain it, added the Steam Machine to its list of conformant products. This does not indicate how far or soon a product will come to the market, but it's a step in the right direction showing that much-awaited console will arrive... someday.
articles.title_zh: Steam Machine出現在Vulkan合規產品數據庫中——即將推出的Valve遊戲機獲得圖形API合規認證
articles.summary_zh: 創建和維護Vulkan API標準的Khronos Group將Steam Machine加入其合規產品清單，這表明該產品在朝正確方向發展。

articles.title: We tested Advanced Shader Delivery on the RX 9070 XT in six games — up to 95% improvement in load times and 33 percent faster 1% Low FPS
articles.summary: Today, we will take a look at Advanced Shader Delivery (ASD) – a new gaming feature aimed at improving the overall user experience by reducing load times dramatically and improving 1% low FPS. We tested six games, measuring up to a 95% improvement in game loading times and solid improvements in 1% Low FPS in some titles.
articles.title_zh: 我們在RX 9070 XT上測試了Advanced Shader Delivery，六款遊戲中加載時間提升高達95%，1% Low FPS快33%
articles.summary_zh: Advanced Shader Delivery（ASD）是一項新遊戲功能，旨在通過大幅減少加載時間和改善1% Low FPS來提升用戶體驗。

articles.title: Ubisoft reportedly testing generative AI in Far Cry 7, insider says it 'looks like sh*t' — company recently posted a record €1.3 billion loss
articles.summary: Ubisoft is using an early build of its unannounced Far Cry 7 as a testbed for generative AI tools, according to Tom Henderson of Insider Gaming.
articles.title_zh: 據報Ubisoft正在Far Cry 7中測試生成式AI，內部人士稱效果"很糟糕"——公司近期錄得創紀錄的€13億虧損
articles.summary_zh: 根據Insider Gaming的Tom Henderson透露，Ubisoft正使用其未公開的Far Cry 7早期構建版本來測試生成式AI工具。

articles.title: Researcher develops 'spray-on' stealth coating for drones — volcanic rock formulation claims to reduce radar return signals by up to 43dB, compared to 20 to 30dB for typical radar absorbent material
articles.summary: Users can easily spray on this radar absorbent material on any drone to increase their survivability in contested skies.
articles.title_zh: 研究人員開發無人機「噴霧式」隱形塗料——火山岩配方聲稱可將雷達反射信號降低高達43dB，相比傳統雷達吸收材料的20至30dB
articles.summary_zh: 用戶可輕易將此雷達吸收材料噴塗在任何無人機上，以提高其在對抗空域中的生存能力。

articles.title: Autonomous ErgoChair Pro Review: Comfortable, but that's it
articles.summary: The Autonomous ErgoChair Pro is a solid entry in the ErgoChair line, offering good back support and adjustability. However, it lacks any standout features that separate it from the wide range of office chairs available.
articles.title_zh: Autonomous ErgoChair Pro評測：舒適，但僅此而已
articles.summary_zh: Autonomous ErgoChair Pro是ErgoChair系列的穩定之作，提供良好的背部支撐和可調性，但缺乏使其與其他辦公椅區分開來的突出功能。

articles.title: Electronics buff hand-draws and etches custom PCBs at home — functional home-etched PCB runs a 3D-printed fume extractor fan
articles.summary: A maker bored with the staid designs of modern factory-produced PCBs has perfected their own hand-inking and home-etching process.
articles.title_zh: 電子愛好者在家手繪並蝕刻定製PCB——功能性自製蝕刻PCB驅動3D打印煙霧淨化風扇
articles.summary_zh: 一位對現代工廠生產PCB設計感到厭倦的製客已完善了自己的手工描繪和家庭蝕刻工藝。

articles.title: New video of melted Bambu Lab A1 sparks debate about whether the 3D printer is still a fire hazard — critics push for recall while redditors suspect external factors
articles.summary: Bambu Lab is once more in hot water after user Moreiras3D posted a video of a melted A1 3D printer to Instagram. The footage shows an A1 with its side completely melted down to the metal chassis, but some of the key details behind the incident remain unknown.
articles.title_zh: Bambu Lab A1熔化新視頻引發3D打印機是否仍存在火災隱患的爭議——批評者要求召回，而Reddit用戶懷疑外部因素
articles.summary_zh: 用戶Moreiras3D在Instagram上發布了熔化的A1 3D打印機視頻後，Bambu Lab再次陷入困境。視頻顯示A1的側面完全熔化至金屬底盤，但事件的關鍵細節仍不清楚。

articles.title: Cyberpunk 2077 cosplay jacket features a $1,200 flexible OLED collar that you can game on with a Steam Controller — dual Raspberry Pi 4s power the wearable tech
articles.summary: A robotics and animatronic cosplay enthusiast has made a real-life Cyberpunk 2077 NUSA Infiltrator jacket with a built-in collar display.
articles.title_zh: Cyberpunk 2077角色扮演夾克配備$1,200柔性OLED領口，可用Steam Controller遊玩——雙Raspberry Pi 4驅動可穿戴技術
articles.summary_zh: 一位機器人與動畫角色扮演愛好者製作了一件真實的Cyberpunk 2077 NUSA Infiltrator夾克，內置領口顯示屏。

articles.title: Commercial satellite supplying intel to Ukraine is cornered by four Russian spacecraft — US Space Force can only watch as Russia threatens 'quasi-civilian' targets
articles.summary: These Russian satellites are getting uncomfortably close to a U.S.- and European-operated radar satellite, particularly in Ukraine, used for reconnaissance missions. While their intentions are unclear, these maneuvers consume a lot of fuel and are not typically undertaken by other satellites.
articles.title_zh: 為烏克蘭供應情報的商業衛星遭四顆俄羅斯航天器包圍——美國太空軍只能旁觀俄羅斯威脅「準民用」目標
articles.summary_zh: 這些俄羅斯衛星與用於烏克蘭偵察任務的美國和歐洲運營雷達衛星距離過近，其意圖不明確，但此類機動燃料消耗大，其他衛星通常不會進行。

articles.title: Apple Intelligence image models to boast ‘major’ visual upgrades in iOS 27: report
articles.summary: According to this weekend’s Power On newsletter , Apple’s image generation models – used in Genmoji and Image Playground – will be receiving a ‘big boost’ in visual quality. Currently, they’re far from anything to write home about. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple Intelligence 影像模型將在 iOS 27 中獲得「重大」視覺升級：報告
articles.summary_zh: 根據最新報導，Apple 用於 Genmoji 和 Image Playground 的影像生成模型將獲得視覺品質的重大提升。目前這些模型的效果還有待改進。

articles.title: iOS 27 could offer native integration with Google Cast and other streaming protocols
articles.summary: In response to the European Union’s Digital Markets Act (DMA), Apple is reportedly working on the ability to replace AirPlay with other third-party streaming protocols at a system level. This feature may only roll out in the European Union, similar to third-party app marketplaces. more…
articles.title_zh: iOS 27 可能提供與 Google Cast 和其他串流協議的原生整合
articles.summary_zh: 為應對歐盟《數位市場法》，Apple 據報正在開發在系統層級用第三方串流協議替代 AirPlay 的功能，該功能可能僅在歐盟推出。

articles.title: Report: iOS 27 to revamp the AirPods settings UI
articles.summary: While a dedicated ‘AirPods’ app does not seem to be on the cards, AirPods Pro. Bloomberg says iOS 27 will significantly change the layout of the AirPods menu in Settings app. The new design will be ‘more functional, better organized and more streamlined’. more…
articles.title_zh: 報告：iOS 27 將改版 AirPods 設定介面
articles.summary_zh: iOS 27 將大幅改變設定應用中 AirPods 功能表的配置，新設計將更具功能性、更好地組織且更簡潔。

articles.title: Two affordable iPhone 17 Pro accessories worth trying
articles.summary: While my preferred way to use an iPhone is with no case or screen protector, I’m actually enjoying both on iPhone 17 Pro and can recommend them. They’re inexpensive enough to try without committing for a year or more. more…
articles.title_zh: 兩款平價 iPhone 17 Pro 配件值得一試
articles.summary_zh: 這些廉價的 iPhone 17 Pro 配件無需長期承諾即可體驗，值得推薦嘗試。

articles.title: YouTube’s recommendations feel worse in 2026, but these 5 simple tricks fixed mine
articles.summary: I budget for streaming services monthly, but YouTube still plays a core role in my entertainment routine. Unlike the relatively limited list of movies and shows on these services, YouTube houses hundreds of millions of videos on its servers, covering a broad range of topics from millions of creators. This wide array of content is beneficial to viewers, but it also means that YouTube’s recommendation punts can often be way off the mark. In recent weeks, I’ve noticed an uptick in disgruntled users online complaining about this very issue. Some lament seeing videos that were previously suggested re-recommended ad nauseam, while others call out suggestions that don’t align with their subscriptions or searches. In short, users aren’t seeing suggestions for videos they’re likely to watch or are
articles.title_zh: YouTube 在 2026 年的推薦功能變得更差，但這 5 個簡單技巧幫我改善了
articles.summary_zh: YouTube 在娛樂日常中仍扮演重要角色，擁有數百萬創作者上傳的數億部影片，涵蓋廣泛主題。

articles.title: I tested the Samsung Galaxy A57 5G for a month and I liked it, but I’m not sure you should buy one
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy A57 5G is the most expensive phone in the Galaxy A series for 2026, and the A series has been the highest-selling Android lineup year after year. The Galaxy A5x phones sit squarely between Samsung’s budget options and the flagship S series , aiming to strike the right balance between value and the convenience features people actually care about. When I received the Galaxy A57 5G for review, I was just about to leave for a trip to Seattle. Instead of easing into the review slowly, I pulled my SIM out of my Galaxy Z Fold 7, the most expensive phone Samsung sells in the US, and dropped it into the $550 A57 5G. The plan was to swap back when I got home.
articles.title_zh: 我試用了 Samsung Galaxy A57 5G 一個月，我喜歡它，但我不確定你是否應該買
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy A57 5G 是 2026 年 Galaxy A 系列中最昂貴的機型，該系列多年來一直是銷量最高的 Android 陣容。

articles.title: Using Windows Phone in 2026 reminded me just how badly I miss it
articles.summary: Credit: Robert Triggs / Android Authority Die-hard Windows Phone 8.1 fans have been hard at work recently. First, there was an update to the alternative app marketplace, 8Marketplace . Shortly after, a third-party app unofficially brought Telegram support to the platform. We’ve also seen updates to a few other apps recently, bringing Bluesky support and more. The renewed interest certainly got my attention. While I never used the Windows Phone platform as my daily driver beyond a brief period around 2014, when I bought a secondhand Lumia 1020, I did really enjoy it. I even had a Windows 10 Mobile-powered Lumia 650 I used as a secondary device. While I liked the Lumia 650’s Windows 10 Mobile experience, I felt like Windows Phone 8.1 was a better platform overall, and so I was excited to see
articles.title_zh: 在 2026 年使用 Windows Phone 讓我想起我有多麼懷念它
articles.summary_zh: Windows Phone 8.1 的忠實粉絲最近在努力更新替代應用市場 8Marketplace，並為該平台帶來第三方 Telegram 支援。

articles.title: 8 features I use for listening to any audiobook on Audible
articles.summary: Audible is one of the easiest media apps to use, which is probably why so many users never dig much deeper into it. For most people, it really is as simple as purchasing a book and pressing play. Yet after years of using the app, I’ve learned to tailor the experience quite a bit. I rely on Audible for everything from long walks to laundry, and it’s my go-to fix for the occasional bout of insomnia. Over time, I’ve settled into a handful of settings and features I now adjust before starting almost any audiobook. None of them dramatically change the app, but they do make listening smoother and occasionally enforce more self-control than I’m capable of on my own.
articles.title_zh: 我用於在 Audible 上聆聽任何有聲書的 8 個功能
articles.summary_zh: Audible 是最易用的媒體應用之一，經過多年使用，我學會了如何大幅客製化體驗。

articles.title: I’d switch to a Pixel in a heartbeat if it weren’t for this Samsung app
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority Between my old Galaxy S22 and the current S26, I’ve been a loyal Samsung user for over four years now. But I’ve always been tempted by Pixel phones. Not just as a secondary device, but to actually use it as a daily driver. And honestly, devices like the Pixel 10 and Pixel 10a make a very compelling case for themselves. You get a clean Android experience, useful Pixel-only features , and above all, faster software updates. But if there’s one Samsung app that stops me from making the switch, it’s Good Lock . It’s not just any OEM app — it’s more like a toolkit for power users. And the more I’ve used it over the years, the more it’s changed what I expect from a smartphone.
articles.title_zh: 如果不是因為這個 Samsung 應用，我會立即改用 Pixel
articles.summary_zh: 作為 Samsung 使用者超過四年，我一直對 Pixel 手機心動，但某些應用讓我無法轉換。

articles.title: This battery-powered security camera kit is so good that I’m canceling my Ring subscription
articles.summary: We can understand it’s hard to trust anything other than the big security camera brands. Your home security depends on whatever you buy, after all. That is a big deal! There is a lot more out there than Ring, Arlo, Nest, and Wyze, though. And while plenty of options aren’t worth your patronage, there are some gems out there. I’ve been testing a set of four Botslab W510 4K AI Security Camera units () for a few months. They are my main security cameras, and I have temporarily removed my Ring setup. Is the grass any greener with Botslab?
articles.title_zh: 這款電池供電的安全攝影機套件好到我要取消 Ring 訂閱
articles.summary_zh: 除了 Ring、Arlo、Nest 和 Wyze 外，市場上還有許多值得考慮的安全攝影機選擇。

articles.title: I’ve used the new Google Health app for a week, and I hate it
articles.summary: There’s no denying that Google’s updated Health app looks gorgeous, feels alive, and contains animated graphs and cards that just want to jump from the screen and stare at you. My colleague Stephen has already sung the praises of this redesign since it landed in the Fitbit-branded app first, and I agree with every word he said: it is beautiful. However, having used the new app for about a week now, I have another categorical feeling about it: It’s counterintuitive, and I hate it. It’s a huge step back in usability, and Google’s single-minded focus on AI has ruined what was a much better experience in my opinion.
articles.title_zh: 我使用新的 Google Health 應用一週後，我討厭它
articles.summary_zh: 雖然 Google 更新的 Health 應用看起來華麗且充滿動畫圖表，但存在一些令人失望的地方。

articles.title: I waited years for Googlebooks — but I wish I hadn’t
articles.summary: The original Google Pixelbook is one of my favorite laptops. Myself and others used it as our primary laptops for years. But, sadly, I eventually couldn’t use mine for work anymore. The aging i5 processor, 8GB of RAM, and 128GB of storage weren’t up to the task anymore, and neither was the battery. On top of that, I needed to use software that wasn’t available on ChromeOS. For years, I have held out for when Google would make another premium laptop. Googlebooks could have been what I’d waited for. They aren’t.
articles.title_zh: 我等了多年的 Googlebooks——但我希望我沒有等
articles.summary_zh: 原始 Google Pixelbook 是我最喜愛的筆記型電腦之一，但其老舊的處理器、記憶體和電池最終已無法滿足工作需求。

articles.title: Wear OS 7 is the ultimate insult to Pixel owners
articles.summary: Google made an avalanche of announcements during its Google I/O keynote this past week. Wear OS 7 was among the reveals, a pretty robust update to Google’s wearable operating system. Google claims users will experience a 10% increase in battery life and that features like Live Updates will be available. Wear OS 7 will also include a visual refresh, with new Tile designs. However, one announced feature immediately made me angry. Google states that certain Gemini Intelligence features will be available on select future smartwatches. It’s a bizarre development, especially considering what Google listed as the requirements for devices to get Gemini Intelligence. It doesn’t make sense, and it’s turning into yet another insult for Pixel buyers who want their phones to get the latest and greatest
articles.title_zh: Wear OS 7 是對 Pixel 擁有者的終極侮辱
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 大會上發表了 Wear OS 7，這是對其穿戴式作業系統的重大更新，號稱可提升電池續航力並帶來新功能。

articles.title: Sony 1000X The ColleXion, Xiaomi 17 Max are official
articles.summary: The Xiaomi 17 Max arrived this week, completing the series. It lacks the secondary screen of the Pro Max, but adds a 200MP main camera and a larger 8,000mAh Si-C battery. It uses the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 with up to 16 gigs of memory, a triple rear camera system - 200MP wide, 50MP 3x zoom, 50MP 17mm ultrawide, and a 32MP selfie upfront. Xiaomi 17 Max comes in black, white, and blue colors. Pricing in China for the 12/256GB trim starts at CNY 4,799 ($705/€609 converted) and goes up to CNY 5,799 ($853/€735 converted) for the 16/512GB trim. The rumored Samsung Galaxy S27 Pro will...
articles.title_zh: Sony 1000X The ColleXion、Xiaomi 17 Max 正式發布
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi 17 Max 完成了該系列，配備 200MP 主攝像頭、8,000mAh Si-C 電池和 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 處理器。

articles.title: Deals: Galaxy S26 Ultra is $250 off, foldables on sale, Sony WH-1000X The ColleXion launches
articles.summary: This week we’ll look at a grab bag of phones, focusing mostly on higher end devices, though there are a few mid-rangers in here too. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is $50 less than it was last week. There is already One UI 9 beta available for testing (based on Android 17) – the US is one of the select few regions where Samsung conducts early tests. The new version will bring accessibility improvements, new security features, better controls for the Quick Panel and so on. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra $250 off ...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Galaxy S26 Ultra 便宜 $250、摺疊機特價、Sony WH-1000X The ColleXion 上市
articles.summary_zh: 本週主要介紹高階手機優惠，Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 比上週便宜 $50，並有 One UI 9 測試版可用。

articles.title: I tried Amazon’s Bee wearable and am both intrigued and slightly creeped out
articles.summary: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee offers an odd combination of convenience and privacy anxiety.
articles.title_zh: 我試用了Amazon的Bee穿戴裝置，既感到好奇又有點毛骨悚然
articles.summary_zh: 像其他AI穿戴裝置一樣，Amazon的Bee提供了方便性與隱私焦慮的奇特組合。

articles.title: How Jaeger hit 8.6× compression on 10 million spans with ClickHouse
articles.summary: As someone who’s been maintaining Jaeger , I’ve watched users request ClickHouse support consistently over the past few years. With Jaeger v2.18.0, we’ve finally delivered it. What excites me most isn’t just that ClickHouse is available—it’s that its architecture is practically custom-built for telemetry at scale. It swallows massive, append-only write streams and handles complex analytical aggregations in milliseconds, offering teams a highly efficient, production-grade storage backend. For those new to the project, Jaeger is a graduated Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) distributed tracing platform built to monitor and troubleshoot complex microservices. It tracks requests across service boundaries to expose latency bottlenecks and root causes,
articles.title_zh: Jaeger 如何通過 ClickHouse 在 1000 萬個 spans 上實現 8.6 倍壓縮
articles.summary_zh: Jaeger v2.18.0 終於推出了 ClickHouse 支援，其架構設計使得數據壓縮效率遠超預期。

articles.title: What ClickHouse learned from a year of coding with AI agents
articles.summary: Some people will tell you agents will take all our jobs. Others insist they are useless. Leadership at many companies mandates “AI usage” without explaining what that entails, leaving engineers confused. We use coding agents at ClickHouse. They work. But they don’t work for everything, and the line between “use the agent” and “don’t bother” moved several times during 2025. Here is where we landed, and how we got there. The three levels of AI-assisted coding It helps to break the space into three levels. Level 1: copy-pasting from a chat. You ask a model a question in a browser tab and paste snippets into your editor. Many engineers have been doing this since 2023. It is still useful for exploration. Compared to agents, it is obsolete. Level 2
articles.title_zh: ClickHouse 從一年的 AI agents 編程中學到的經驗
articles.summary_zh: ClickHouse 在實踐中使用編碼 AI agents，發現其在特定場景下效果顯著，但並非適用於所有情況。

articles.title: Topo Designs Rover Trail Pack Is the Best Backpack I’ve Ever Used
articles.summary: Unsurprisingly, the Denver gorpcore brand that makes many of the best bags in the world has delivered a perfect backpack.
articles.title_zh: Topo Designs Rover Trail Pack 是我用過最好的背包
articles.summary_zh: 這個來自丹佛的 gorpcore 品牌製造了世界上許多最好的背包，這次推出了完美的登山背包。

articles.title: The Best Browser Extensions to Get More Out of YouTube
articles.summary: You can significantly improve the YouTube experience with these browser add-ons.
articles.title_zh: 最好的瀏覽器擴充功能讓你充分利用 YouTube
articles.summary_zh: 這些瀏覽器附加功能可以顯著改善你的 YouTube 體驗。

articles.title: These Robots Are Making Meals for a Nonprofit in San Francisco’s Tenderloin
articles.summary: A nonprofit in the city’s most troubled district has turned to robotic meal prep tech to make up for a dearth of human volunteers.
articles.title_zh: 這些機器人正在舊金山 Tenderloin 為非營利組織準備餐點
articles.summary_zh: 該市最困難地區的一個非營利組織已轉向機器人餐飲準備技術，以彌補人類志願者的嚴重短缺。

articles.title: 14 New Tools for Taking on the Great Outdoors Properly
articles.summary: It’s time to prep your kit ahead of the summer season. These tools will do the job.
articles.title_zh: 14 個適當探索戶外的新工具
articles.summary_zh: 現在是時候在夏季前準備好你的裝備了。這些工具將完成工作。

articles.title: Why Garlic Repels Mosquitoes and Keeps Them From Breeding
articles.summary: Garlic, as your grandmother may have told you, repels mosquitoes; it also completely blocks them from mating and laying eggs. Diallyl disulfide, it turns out, deserves the credit.
articles.title_zh: 為什麼大蒜能驅除蚊子並阻止牠們繁殖
articles.summary_zh: 正如你的祖母可能告訴過你的那樣，大蒜可以驅除蚊子，並完全阻止牠們交配和產卵。結果證明 Diallyl disulfide 應該獲得這個功勞。

articles.title: A Fundamental Principle of Aeronautical Engineering Has Been Overturned
articles.summary: It's long been accepted that the smoother the surface, the lower the aerodynamic drag. That turns out not always to be the case.
articles.title_zh: 航空工程的一項基本原理被推翻了
articles.summary_zh: 長期以來，人們一直認為表面越光滑，空氣動力阻力就越小。但事實並非總是如此。

articles.title: The Universe Is Full of ‘Impossible’ Black Holes. Now Scientists Know Why
articles.summary: There are black holes that are too big to be born from the death of a star but aren’t quite supermassive either. There’s finally evidence for where those came from.
articles.title_zh: 宇宙充滿了「不可能的」黑洞。現在科學家知道為什麼了
articles.summary_zh: 有些黑洞太大，無法從恆星死亡中產生，但也不是完全超大質量的。現在終於有證據表明它們的來源。

articles.title: The Surprising Science Behind Google Searches
articles.summary: Google Data Editor and Author Simon Rogers joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his new book "What We Ask Google: A Surprisingly Hopeful History of Humankind." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Google 搜尋背後的令人驚訝的科學
articles.summary_zh: Google Data Editor 和作者 Simon Rogers 在 Bloomberg This Weekend 上與 Christina Ruffini 和 David Gura 討論他的新書《What We Ask Google: A Surprisingly Hopeful History of Humankind》。

articles.title: How New Mega-Cap IPO's Will Reshape the Markets
articles.summary: SpaceX is marketing itself to IPO investors as an artificial intelligence targeting a $26.5 trillion potential market opportunity. The move signaling its intention to wrest business from investor darlings whose valuations have soared. Bloomberg Market Structure Research Head Larry Tabb joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 新的超大型 IPO 將如何重塑市場
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 向 IPO 投資者宣傳自己為人工智慧，目標是 26.5 兆美元的潛在市場機會。此舉表明其意圖是從估值已飆升的投資者寵兒手中搶奪業務。

articles.title: Apple’s Watch and Health Efforts Need Reboot to Rival New Wearables
articles.summary: Also: iOS 27 AirPods, Genmoji and AirPlay details.
articles.title_zh: Apple 的 Watch 和健康努力需要重啟以與新穿戴裝置競爭
articles.summary_zh: 另外：iOS 27 AirPods、Genmoji 和 AirPlay 詳情。

articles.title: Whatever the mirror test tells us, beluga whales pass it
articles.summary: In hours of underwater video footage from a New York aquarium, a beluga whale named Natasha stretches her neck, pirouettes, nods, and shakes her head in front of a two-way mirror. Her daughter Maris does much the same. According to a new study published in PLOS One , both animals show the behavioral hallmarks of mirror self-recognition—a cognitive ability long considered a marker of self-awareness, and one that had never before been documented in beluga whales. If the result holds up, belugas join a remarkably short list. The mirror self-recognition test (MSR) has been passed, with varying degrees of confidence, by humans (starting around age two), a handful of great apes (chimps, bonobos, orangutans, and—somewhat contentiously—gorillas), Asian elephants , bottlenose dolphins , probably ma
articles.title_zh: 無論鏡子測試告訴我們什麼，白鯨都通過了它
articles.summary_zh: 在紐約水族館的數小時水下影片中，一隻名叫 Natasha 的白鯨在雙向鏡子前伸展脖子、旋轉、點頭和搖頭。她的女兒 Maris 也做著同樣的事情。根據發表在 PLOS One 上的新研究，兩隻動物都表現出了行為證據。

articles.title: CISA警示Drupal的SQL注入漏洞已被用於實際攻擊
articles.summary: 上週內容管理系統Drupal開發團隊修補SQL注入漏洞CVE-2026-9082，根據Drupal本身的風險評估結果為20分（滿分25分），被評為最危險的超重大等級（Highly Critical），顯示其威脅程度極高，兩天後美國網路安全暨基礎設施安全局（CISA）掌握遭到利用的跡象，將其加入已遭利用漏洞清單（K

articles.title: 駭客團體TeamPCP兜售GitHub近4千個儲存庫資料，底價為5萬美元
articles.summary: 根據資安新聞網站Bleeping Computer報導，駭客團體TeamPCP近日聲稱竊得GitHub近4千個內部儲存庫的程式碼，並以5萬美元底價公開競標，並聲稱只會有一位買家得標，一旦買賣成立，他們就會提供資料並銷毀手上的備份。若無買家出價競標，將直接公布這批檔案。
articles.title_zh: 駭客團體TeamPCP兜售GitHub近4千個儲存庫資料，底價為5萬美元

articles.title: 為AI與量子運算做好準備，全面強化資安治理已成當務之急
articles.summary: 【2026臺灣資安大會直擊】生成式AI的快速發展與普及，固然帶來眾多創新的機會，卻也重新定義當代資安防護的範疇，而在先進AI模型陸續問世的此刻，雖然大幅提升發現與修補漏洞的能力，更是對資安造成前所未有的衝擊，緊接在後的下一波技術趨勢變革，還有量子運算即將崛起，該如何繼續確保資安，也成為整個IT領域的重要議題，Palo Alto Networks日本暨亞太地區政策與政府事務副總裁Nicole Quinn認為，攻擊是可以預防的，資安問題是能夠解決的，關鍵在於能否充分運用AI進行防禦， 我們必須掌握三大策略：提升事件偵測與遏制的速度、降低基於身分與AI代理而導致的風險暴露，以及建立涵蓋整個網路環境的運作狀態觀測分析視野，改善雲端服務、端點

articles.title: 針對內部儲存庫遭駭事故，GitHub證實為受到Nx Console的供應鏈攻擊波及
articles.summary: 5月20日GitHub於社群網站X透露近3,800個內部儲存庫遭駭，事故發生的源頭，是一名員工不慎安裝有問題的Visual Studio Code（VS Code）延伸套件，所以引發事故。由於駭客團體TeamPCP對TanStack發動攻擊之後，有許多開發團隊遭受波及，很容易讓人聯想這起事故也與TanStack事故有關，如今這樣的推測成真。
articles.title_zh: 針對內部儲存庫遭駭事故，GitHub證實為受到Nx Console的供應鏈攻擊波及
articles.summary_zh: 5月20日GitHub於社群網站X透露近3,800個內部儲存庫遭駭，事故發生的源頭，是一名員工不慎安裝有問題的Visual Studio Code（VS Code）延伸套件，所以引發事故。由於駭客團體TeamPCP對TanStack發動攻擊之後，有許多開發團隊遭受波及，很容易讓人聯想這起事故也與TanStack事故有關，如今這樣的推測成真。

articles.title: Nx Console的VS Code延伸套件被植入竊資軟體
articles.summary: 5月18日Nx Console的Visual Studio Code（VS Code）延伸套件nrwl.angular-console傳出遭遇供應鏈攻擊，駭客在VS Code延伸套件市集上架有問題的v18.95.0。揭露此事的資安公司StepSecurity指出，一旦開發者不慎安裝，他們只要開啟VS Code的任意工作區，此延伸套件就會從特定GitHub儲存庫的提交內容取得經混淆處理的惡意酬載，檔案大小為498 KB。
